schema_source: agents.md L135-152 (row-packet schema for final-resolution work)

q_gen.desc: |B|, the base field (pigeonhole cost base for the identity-prefix construction)

q_line.desc: |F|, the line/sampling field; also Q for B*=floor(eps* Q)

q_chal.desc: no distinct challenge field pinned anywhere in the repo for this certificate family; site/data/rate-leaderboards.json prints "protocol-dependent" for every row

q_list.note: no interleaved-list-layer denominator has been fixed for the MCA row's own upper ledger (the paid_L1/interleaved_list_layer cell is open).

important_note_deep_point_threshold.desc: The MCA row's checked unsafe certificate uses the deep-point conversion threshold Theta=(q+k)/k (thm:A), NOT a literal comparison against B*. Theta ~ [2^165.9, 2^166.0), far above B*~2^57.932. The identity-prefix construction proves the auxiliary dimension-K list floor F(a) exceeds Theta at a0, which converts (via thm:A) to the row's MCA error exceeding B* -- a sufficient, not literal, unsafe condition. See AUDIT-2 in this packet's audit_findings.

one_step_target.desc: the immediate adjacent pair this packet's staircase aims to pin (agents.md 'finite deployed one-step resolution')

full_open_band_nearest_unconditional_saf.source: cor:conditional-half, imports BCIKS20 Thm 4.1 (single named import, PROVED external)

v13_raw_moved_pair.source: upstream #310 commit f049b91 (composes lem:v13f1-identity-prefix-floor with prop:quantitative-deep-list-floor); maintainer v13 raw scripts experimental/scripts/towards v13/{cap25_v13_raw_moved_frontier_checks,collision_margins}.py @ commit 2b5b7ce
v13_raw_moved_pair.rung_audit_verdict: GREEN (no inversion, no frontier-tight rung at a0'+1; tightest frontier rung = identity c=1, -22.1969 b)

unsafe_certificates.statement: L(a0) > Theta_mca  ==>  (via thm:A deep-point conversion) row error exceeds B*
unsafe_certificates.status: PAID_BY_EXACT_CERTIFICATE (exact integer certificate; reproduced this session via experimental/scripts/towards v13/cap25_v13_frontier_identity_exact_checks.py, 12/12 PASS, and independently by this packet family's own verifier)

safe_certificates.detail: NOT ESTABLISHED for this or any of the 4 v13 frontier rows anywhere in the repo. Taxonomy-accurate label: CONJECTURAL_WITH_FALSIFIER (prob:v13f1-frontier is an open problem, tex L1448-1464, not a theorem). This packet's contribution (rung_margin_audit) closes the periodic/quotient veto (Audit 1) but leaves the aperiodic (prob:band), L1 (prob:v13-l1-residuals, prob:v13-primitive-image-fiber), and sparse (prob:mutual/prob:sparse-mutual) cells fully open.

quotient.rung_margin_audit_verdict: GREEN (no inversion, no frontier-tight rung; Audit 1 executed in full)

paid_cells_summary.note: See safe_cell_table for the full per-cell breakdown with the 5-status labels and references.

safe_cell_table.upper_bound_value: NOT LICENSED at this row (see note)
safe_cell_table.note: thm:deep-mca eq(b) certifies B_tan(a)<=r+1 only if 3r<=n-k (r<=349525); here r=981108 >> 349525, so the upper bound does not apply as a certified upper cell -- only the unconditional lower floor 981109 is available.

safe_cell_table.cell: paid_quotient (B_Q^all, union over dyadic scales c=2^0..2^20, three slack profiles Gfloor/Gceil/Rem/Plant, descending priority)
safe_cell_table.formula: graded-prefix family (prop:graded-prefix-floor) + remainder floor (lem:quotient-remainder-prefix) + planted core (thm:v13-planted)
safe_cell_table.value_at_a0_plus_1: TBD (no upper-bound derivation exists; this packet's rung_margin_audit block certifies NO scale/profile fires or is tight at a0+1 -- Audit 1 of the strategy note, executed exactly)
safe_cell_table.note: Audit 1 (this packet's rung_margin_audit block) upgrades the earlier 'c in {2,4,8,16,32} does not fire' spot-check to a FULL exact-integer scan: all 21 dyadic scales x 3 slack profiles (Gfloor/Gceil/Rem, plus Plant where defined), at both a0 and a0+1. Verdict: no inversion, no frontier-tight rung (GREEN). 'Does not fire / not tight' is still NOT the same as 'has a certified small upper bound' -- no B_Q^all(a0+1) upper-bound computation exists; the periodic-side cheap refutation is merely excluded, per Audit 1's own scope (strategy note sec 2.1).
No computation of any kind attempted anywhere in the repo for this cell at this row; not even a named-input target has been derived yet.
safe_cell_table.named_input: certified descended-cycle classification inventory (ef_* soundness lemmas) or zero-dimensional Weil-restricted eliminant; K=B and B<K<F branches PAID_BY_THEOREM (routed to lower-arity base cells)

target.note: e_Y=0 forced: any positive-dimensional chart contributes >= q_gen ~ 2^31

safe_cell_table.formula: emca(C,delta') = max(eca(C,delta'), sigma_C(delta')/q); delta' > 1/4 => sparse layer dominates (rem:sparsify-recover)
safe_cell_table.note: Open problem prob:mutual/prob:sparse-mutual (towards-prize.tex L852-861) bounds sigma_C(delta) for (1-rho)/2 < delta < 1-rho-s_rho/n, which covers this row's delta'=245277/524288. If sigma_C <= 274980728111395087 were proved, this cell alone would pay the row (modulo all others also clearing); not proved.

safe_cell_table.formula: pma_wide_residual = pma_pullback_lists (PROVABLE, exponential, budgeted) UNION primitive residual (open)
safe_cell_table.note: DAG nodes pma_wide_residual (TARGET) / pma_pullback_lists (PROVABLE) in experimental/data/prize-dag/prize_dag.json; tex open problems prob:v13-l1-residuals (mixed-petal/growing-defect residuals) and prob:v13-primitive-image-fiber (stabilizer-primitive image-fiber bound). pma_pullback_lists itself is a PROVED counterexample to an unqualified correlated-target hope, not a closure; the primitive residual pma_wide_residual remains open.

safe_cell_table.formula: B_ap(a) <= P(n), P polynomial (asymptotic route) or exact SPI/eliminant closure (finite route)
safe_cell_table.note: prob:band (cs25_cap_v12.tex L4590-4596) is the repo's central open problem: no polynomial P is proved for the aperiodic residual kernel anywhere in the open band; experimental/cap25_v13_missing_inputs_strategy.md sec 1 (Route alpha/beta/gamma) is the current attack map, still open. Falsifier: exhibit, at a0+1=1116044, more than 274980728111395087 MCA-bad finite slopes (or list codewords) whose witness supports are all aperiodic (periodicity-scale def), OR a polynomial P(n) certificate for the whole band.

safe_cell_table.value: N/A (structural placeholder; see prob:v13-l1-residuals, prob:v13-primitive-image-fiber, prob:band)
safe_cell_table.note: No COUNTEREXAMPLE_NEW_FLOOR has been triggered for this row; if one of the open cells above is ever refuted with an explicit larger witness, it converts to this label and becomes a new obstruction floor.

rung_margin_audit.reference: experimental/cap25_v13_missing_inputs_strategy.md sec 2.1 Audit 1 (rung margins); executed in full here

conventions.Gfloor: prop:graded-prefix-floor, m=floor(a/c); covers agreement mc<=a (A1 convention)
conventions.Gceil: graded floor with m=ceil(a/c); covers agreement mc>=a (>=frontier)
conventions.Rem: lem:quotient-remainder-prefix, s=a-mc; covers agreement EXACTLY a
conventions.Plant: thm:v13-planted, M=c; P=C(n/c-1,k/c) at agreement k+sigma, 1<=sigma<c

Plant.note: covers only agreement<=k+c-1<a; not an a0+1 witness

SPI_wall.reference: experimental/notes/m1/cap25_v13_spi_identically_split_repair.md, wall CAP25-V13-M1-UNIFORM-SPLIT-LOCATOR-DETERMINANT-COMPRESSION (toy scale only, not wired to this deployed row)

protocol_branch.reference: agents.md 'Protocol resolution' level (3 of 3); not engaged at this finite one-step level

deduplication_rule.rule: first-match by descending priority in cell_order; a bad parameter already charged to an earlier cell (its root divides P_paid,F(Z)) is removed by gcd before the next cell counts, so B_Q^all counts the UNION across divisor scales not the max (thm:conditional-mca (i)); duplicate slopes coalesced across scales via the root-union table.

endpoint_convention.statement: Closed integer Hamming radius r=n-a grid; N(a) nonincreasing in a; a is safe iff N(a)<=B*, unsafe iff N(a)>B*. First safe a* satisfies N(a*-1)>B*>=N(a*). The real closed-ball supremum of safe radii is (n-a*+1)/n, and this endpoint is NOT attained when N(a*-1)>B* (cor:v13-endpoint).

replay.expected_exit_code_meaning: 0 = all gates (G1-G6) pass: B* recompute, unsafe-side replay, adjacent bracket, safe-theorem gap table, packet-consistency, and the FULL rung-margin table all independently reproduced. This does NOT mean a0+1 is certified safe -- the master safe-side claim is not gated (see safe_certificates.status=OPEN); the verifier prints the open-cell targets as INFO, never as a passing gate.
replay.seed_or_hash: none (integrity is exact byte-for-byte re-derivability from stdlib-only scripts)

status_note: Per-component status varies: the unsafe half is effectively exact (PAID_BY_EXACT_CERTIFICATE); the periodic/quotient veto is now closed exactly (this packet's rung_margin_audit, GREEN); the remaining safe half is CONJECTURAL_WITH_FALSIFIER (aperiodic/L1/sparse cells are open research problems, not bookkeeping gaps -- see safe_cell_table). EXPERIMENTAL is correct at the packet level because the packet as a whole cannot yet certify a safe agreement, matching agents.md's own instruction: 'Do not call these Paper-D theorem rows until the exact adjacent upper ledger is printed and replayed... call them EXPERIMENTAL, CONDITIONAL, or AUDIT.'
audit_findings: AUDIT-1 (eps* carve-out): for KB rows eps*=2^-128 as agents.md states.
AUDIT-2 (fail-margin denominator): (q+k)/k  (deep-point conversion threshold, thm:A) -- NOT B*. fail_margin_equals_Bstar_over_F=False.
AUDIT-3 (tangent upper bound not licensed): B_tan(a)<=r+1 requires 3r<=n-k (r<=349525); here r=981108 >> 349525, so only the unconditional LOWER floor is usable, not an upper cell.

AUDIT-4 (no theorem pays the row): every known safe theorem's minimum safe agreement exceeds a0+1 by >= 377023 agreement points (see applicability_audit_gap_table); the row sits deep inside the still-open v12 band, glued to the unsafe edge.

AUDIT-5 (6 of 7 U(a) cells are open research, not bookkeeping): only paid_tangent (lower floor) is a clean PAID_BY_THEOREM cell; every other cell is CONDITIONAL_ON_NAMED_INPUT or CONJECTURAL_WITH_FALSIFIER against a genuinely unsolved problem (prob:band, prob:v13-l1-residuals, prob:v13-primitive-image-fiber, prob:mutual/prob:sparse-mutual).

FIND-1 (Audit-1 headline, PROVED): no inversion and no frontier-tight rung at a0+1 for this row, over 21 dyadic scales x 3 slack profiles (Gfloor/Gceil/Rem, plus Plant where defined). Tightest frontier-bearing comparison = identity c=1 (-5.4985 bits). Periodic-side refutation excluded; verdict GREEN.

FIND-2 (PROVED): identity c=1 is the sole periodic certifier of unsafety at a0; every c>=2 graded/remainder/planted floor is below Theta; nothing certifies at a0+1. Strengthens rem:v13f1-closure from 'c=2 dominated' to 'all c>=2 dominated'.
FIND-3 (PROVED): remainder floors covering exactly a0+1 are ~1e6 bits below Theta for every c>=2 (prefix weight w_c blow-up); planted cores reaching a0+1 peak at 6435 (well below B*).
FIND-4 (Audit-2, PROVED): descent per-rung-loss ceiling at R=log2(n)=21: 1.199. Strategy note's qualitative '~1.2 / lesssim 2' claim verified quantitatively.

cross_checks_performed.against_A1_ledger_numbers_json: Bstar, tangent floor, max_C values, graded-scale fires_unsafe flags, applicability-audit thresholds, delta_prime, sigma_C target -- all sourced from A1_ledger_numbers.json and asserted internally consistent with A1b_rung_numbers.json here (see generator script asserts).
cross_checks_performed.against_A1b_rung_numbers_json: the entire rung_margin_audit block; c1_identity_margins cross-checked against A1's own Fc_vs_Theta_bits at c in {2,4,8,16,32} (A1b's own cross_checks.A1_graded_scales, ALL MATCH true).
cross_checks_performed.against_pr271_certificate: 1493067 cross-read from experimental/data/certificates/koalabear-bchks25-jmca-safe-edge-v1/certificate.json (safe_A field), not merely trusted from recon prose.
cross_checks_performed.independent_recompute: experimental/scripts/verify_frontier_adjacent_v13_rows.py reimplements (does not import) every number in this packet from n,k,p_kb,p_m31 alone, including a full independent pass over all 21 dyadic rungs (gate G6).
